title: SNDL Reports Second Quarter 2023 Financial and Operational Results
text: SNDL reported net revenue for Q2 2023 of $244.5 million, compared to $223.7 million in Q2 2022, an increase of 9.3%, marking an all-time high for the company at that time. Cannabis Retail generated net revenue of $71.9 million for Q2 2023, an increase of 13.2% compared to the prior year. This represented a record since SNDL diversified into cannabis retail. Gross margin from Cannabis Retail returned nearly $18 million or 24.7% of sales, a strong 28% increase compared to Q2 2022. A significant contributor to the segment's profitability was SNDL's proprietary data licensing program. This margin expansion opportunity generated revenue of $2.7 million in Q2 2023, compared to $1.3 million in Q2 2022, or 80% growth compared to Q1 2023. Liquor Retail: Net revenue of $151.7 million, an increase of 2.1% compared to the prior year. Cannabis Operations: Net revenue of $20.9 million, an increase of 81% compared to the prior year.
